license.summary: Place directory metadata is sourced from DarkSky International public place records with visible attribution, per-record source URLs, and source timestamps.
license.termsNote: The script excludes page prose, documents, contact details, and image binaries. Featured media is stored as remote URLs only when present in the public REST response. Image captions and alt text are retained only as media attribution audit fields.

Canon T5 with 18mm lens, f/3.5 ISO-6400, 15 second exposure looking south from Deer Mesa just south of Norwood in Montrose County, CO.
